mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO member_tbl ( member_no, member_id, member_pw, member_name, member_phone, member_email, member_role, member_status, enroll_date, login_type ) VALUES ( member_seq.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{memberPw}, #{memberName}, #{memberPhone}, #{memberEmail},
'USER', 'Y', SYSDATE, 'DIRECT' )
mapper.select: select member_no as memberNo, member_id as memberId, member_nickname as memberNickname, member_role as memberRole, member_status as memberStatus, member_thumb as memberThumb from member_tbl where member_no = #{memberNo}
select member_id from member_tbl where member_email = #{memberEmail} fetch first 1 row only
